name: ASRock B650M Pro RS Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - M.2 Key E for WiFi - Support DDR5-6000+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Dragon 2.5G LAN
shortName: ASRock B650M Pro RS Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0
description: Mid-range micro-ATX motherboard with AM5 socket, B650 chipset, and DDR5 support for gaming.
